description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push. The workflow has three jobs: test, build, and release. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10, checks out the repository, installs poetry, sets up Python, installs the project, and runs tests. The build job depends on test, runs on ubuntu-latest if the push is a tag, checks out the repository, installs poetry, sets up Python, builds the project with poetry, and uploads the artifact. The release job depends on build, runs on ubuntu-latest with write permission to repository contents, checks out the repository, installs poetry, sets up Python, downloads the artifact, generates a changelog, and releases the project to GitHub and PyPI.
